# netbox_device_types (Data Source)

Fetches a list of device types from Netbox.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `device_types` (Attributes List) List of device types. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--device_types))
- `id` (String) Placeholder identifier for the data source.

<a id="nestedatt--device_types"></a>
### Nested Schema for `device_types`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) Description for the device type.
- `id` (Number) The numeric ID of the device type.
- `is_full_depth` (Boolean) Whether the device type occupies the full depth of a rack.
- `manufacturer_id` (Number) The ID of the manufacturer.
- `model` (String) The model name of the device type.
- `part_number` (String) Discrete part number for the device type.
- `slug` (String) URL-friendly unique shorthand for the device type.
- `u_height` (Number) Device height in rack units.
